_comment: Copy to config.json and edit for your own run. Every script reads ./config.json by default (override with $FO_CONFIG).

source._comment: The machine about to be wiped / decommissioned. Currently only Windows-over-SSH is supported as a source.

reference._comment: The machine that already has copies of most files. Indexed by mounting/walking locally.

landed_root._comment: Where copies land. The verify step stats files here.

exclude_dirs._comment_app_shared_roots: DANGER: ProgramData, AppData, Public — these are shared-data roots. Excluding them by name buries user-placed portable apps and chat history. Audit their TOP LEVEL first (manually or via subagent), THEN add to this list only if you've confirmed nothing user-valuable lives there. See METHODOLOGY.md section 5.

third_party_names._comment: directory names that mark a public re-clonable repo; add as discovered

user_drop._comment: absolute paths the user has decided NOT to migrate (e.g. Downloads, another-account profile). Filled via Web UI or by hand.

skip_prefix._comment: absolute paths handled out-of-band (e.g. messenger data folder backed up separately as a tar). Excluded from per-file diff.
